features: direct downline bot creation button and /newbot command in master reseller bots
legacy provider command menu and persistent reply keyboard cleanup during token migration and runtime repair
Telegram commands restored after cleaning default, private, group, administrator and owner scopes
plan edit and safe delete in central bot, reseller bot and web control panel
plans with order history remain protected and can be disabled instead of deleted

deployment.automatic_provisioning: upload ZIP through the central bot

validation.telegram_live_api: not run; requires a real bot token

limitations: Telegram bots still require a token created in BotFather; Telegram does not provide an API for one bot to create another bot
